commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f7e0bf345ebb4794910b9d0d833d9f2ec6348f91)
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates gateway chat completion handling to broadcast `state: "error"` and cache an error dedupe result when delivered agent replies include `isError: true`, with regression tests for single and multiple error payloads.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main collects returned `isError` replies, then the `agentRunStarted` post-dispatch branch reaches only the transcript update path and never broadcasts a chat error event; the linked issue includes matching JSONL prompt-error evidence.
commands.review_followup: This PR should stay in human review until the contributor adds real behavior proof and the transcript-update regression is fixed; ClawSweeper should not take over because the proof must come from a real setup.

target.title: fix(gateway): surface resolved chat errors
target.body:
## Summary
- Broadcast `state: "error"` when a completed agent run delivered `isError` reply payloads, covering idle-timeout failures that resolve instead of throw.
- Preserve the error outcome in the chat dedupe entry and add regression coverage for single and multiple delivered error payloads.

Fixes #84945

## Test plan
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts`
- [x] `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts`
- [x] `git diff --check`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
